subtitles.original: 大好きな 歌の中なら
subtitles.english: If it's inside my favorite song...

subtitles.original: 声にいでて いいのぺこ
subtitles.english: it's fine to speak up, peko!

subtitles.original: 思い出が強さになった

subtitles.english: If it's you, you can sing, peko!

subtitles.original: 今日という過去が生まれて
未来にはどうしたいか？ 描くんだ
subtitles.english: What do you want to do in the future? Draw it!

subtitles.original: 心から ぺこらから
「ありがとう」歌ってあげたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to sing "Thank you" to you.

subtitles.original: 響き鳴り渡れ希望の音
subtitles.english: Let the sound of hope ring out!
There are no lies in this miracle!

subtitles.original: 多分 待つだけじゃ叶わない
subtitles.english: Probably just waiting won't make it come true.
The heat that is passed on
will become the spark to make tomorrow shine!

subtitles.original: さあ 新時代へ 引き金を引こう
subtitles.english: Come, let's pull the trigger to the new era,

subtitles.original: 伝説の未来へとカウントダウン
羽ばたきは 一人じゃない
過去を 超えた 先に
subtitles.english: Beyond the past we have surpassed,
The history that should be created

subtitles.original: 響き鳴り渡れ希望の音
subtitles.english: Let the sound of hope ring out!

subtitles.original: 切り裂けまだ見ぬ日に行くために
subtitles.english: Tear it open, to go to days we have not yet seen,

subtitles.original: 不可能なんて何一つない
subtitles.english: There is no such thing as impossible.

subtitles.original: こんなに心強いことはない
subtitles.english: There is nothing as heartening as this.
believe in each other and break through!

subtitles.original: 例え闇に吸い込まれそうになって
subtitles.english: Even if it seems like you'll be sucked into the darkness,

subtitles.original: 涙さえも血に濡れて苦しくっても
subtitles.english: Even if your tears are soaked in blood and it's painful,

subtitles.original: 帰る場所が待っている
subtitles.english: The place to return to is waiting.

subtitles.original: 願い、祈り、すべてを背負い
subtitles.english: Wish, prayer, carrying it all on your back,

subtitles.original: 本気を超えた本気の唄
subtitles.english: A song of earnestness that exceeds earnestness!

subtitles.original: 痛みなんて何も怖くない
出会い笑い合いそして泣きじゃくり
subtitles.english: Meeting, laughing together, and then sobbing,

subtitles.original: 命の炎も一緒に燃やして
subtitles.english: Burning the flame of life together too,

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Synchronization Deep Dive: A Methodical Approach**

Alright, let's break this down. My goal is crystal clear: produce perfectly synchronized, contextually rich subtitles for this video segment. We're talking precision – visual events, vocal events, a decoding hierarchy that respects hardcoded lyrics, mechanical timecode rules, and zero tolerance for those pesky CC tags. I've got a strict set of rules to follow.

First, I examined the scene. The video is approximately 5 minutes long, though the visual cuts, according to the video player, only go up to `05:00` even though the reference JSON mentions up to `05:01`. The reference JSON is the anchor here. I noticed the key timestamps in the JSON: the setup with non-vocal music from `00:00` to `00:51`, and then the song 'RADIANT FORCE' from `00:51` to `05:01`. Now, let's consider the video's contents.

A quick review shows an initial slot-machine-style intro (`00:00`), then the Peko Live logo (`00:25`), a Pekora visual (`00:35`), and the title card at `00:51`. When the song begins at `01:51`, I noted the initial lyrics and compared them to the provided reference lyrics. I found lyrics like "始まりの歌 始まる鼓動" (Hamaru uta, hajimaru kodou) at `01:51`. It seems the timestamps on the frames are valid. Then at `02:30`, "その手は何を掴むためにある?" and at `03:04`, "絆、心、一つに束ね".

Now for the detailed alignment.

I'm keeping meticulous track of every second to ensure accuracy. The intro (`00:00-00:24`) has text slides, even though there's music, so I'm treating this as a visual event and translating the text. I checked the rule: "If prominent, relevant text appears on screen, subtitle it for the duration it is clearly visible, even if there is no audio." In the audio waveform, it looks like there's voiceover, so I will transcript it, which looks like this:
*   `00:00.000` to `00:01.000`: 大好きな (My favorite...) / 歌の中なら (If it's inside a song...)
*   `00:01.500` to `00:03.000`: 声にいでて (Letting my voice out...) / いいのぺこ (Is fine, peko!)
*   `00:03.500` to `00:05.500`: 思い出が強さになった (Memories became strength...)
*   `00:06.000` to `00:08.500`: 君ならば歌えるぺこ (If it's you, you can sing, peko!)
*   `00:09.000` to `00:11.500`: 今日という過去が生まれて (The past called "today" is born...)
*   `00:12.000` to `00:14.500`: 未来にはどうしたいか？ (What do you want to do in the future?)
*   `00:15.000` to `00:16.500`: 描くんだ (Draw it!)
*   `00:17.000` to `00:18.500`: 心から ぺこらから (From the heart, from Pekora...)
*   `00:19.000` to `00:24.000`: 「ありがとう」歌ってあげたいんだ (I want to sing "Thank you" to you...)

The dramatic intro sequence from `00:25` to `00:50` has no vocals, so I will skip this part, per my rules. The title card "RADIANT FORCE" appears at `01:03`, and will be timed with `01:03.000` - `01:09.000`. And when vocals start at `01:51` is where my focused attention on vocal timing begins.

I'm making sure to match the audio precisely.
*   "始まる歌" (Hajimaru uta) -> `01:51
